method: per-page verbatim cross-reference: each installed page's gate3_verbatim_copy_match (build-result.json) is paired with the exact copy.md slot text that page renders. The load-bearing per-page proof is build-result.json pages[].gate3_verbatim_copy_match + marker_in_saved_blob (saved-blob content fetch HTTP 200).
